<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes; /** * @method static typeIf(bool $condition, string|null $type) * @method static typeIfNotNull(bool $condition, string|null $type) * @method static typeUnless(bool $condition, string|null $type) */ trait Type { /** * @param string|null $type * * @return static */ public function type($type) { return $this->attribute('type', $type); } }
